chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 402 of 2021 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on MA No.3442/2021 (U/A) 2. For orders on MA No.3443/2021 (Ex./A) 3. For hearing of bail application 28-06-2021 Mr. Khan Muhammad Sangi, Advocate for applicant / accused..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Applicant / accused Anwar-ul-Hussain Hyder son of Ghulam Hussain Shah seeks protective bail in Crime No.25 of 2021, registered at Police Station Mithiani, District Naushahro Feroze, under Section 489-F, PPC. It is, inter alia, contended by learned counsel for the applicant / accused that the applicant / accused is innocent and has falsely been implicated in this case. It is further contended that the applicant / accused is prepared to surrender before the learned trial Court, but apprehends his arrest as NBW has been issued against him. Without touching the merits of the case, protective bail is granted to the applicant / accused for a period of seven days subject to his furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.30,000/- (Rupees thirty thousand) and P.R. bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the Additional Registrar of this Court. In the meanwhile, operation of NBW, if any, is suspended for a period of seven days. Applicant / accused is directed to surrender before the learned trial Court in the aforesaid period. This order shall cease to have its effect after expiry of seven days or whenever the applicant / accused surrenders before the learned trial Court, which one occurs earlier. It is made clear that in case the applicant / accused fails to surrender before the learned trial Court in the aforesaid period, his bail bond shall stand automatically forfeited.

This order shall cease to have its effect after expiry of seven days or whenever the applicant / accused surrenders before the learned trial Court, which one occurs earlier. It is made clear that in case the applicant / accused fails to surrender before the learned trial Court in the aforesaid period, his bail bond shall stand automatically forfeited. Criminal Bail Application stands disposed of along with the listed applications in the above terms. J U D G E Abdul Basit
